title: Section 101C
content: 1[101C. Examination of re-insurance treaties.--The 2[Authority] may, at any time, -- (a) call upon an insurer to submit for his examination at the principal place of business of the insurer in India all re-insurance treaties and other re-insurance contracts entered into by the insurer; (b) examine any officer of the insurer on oath in relation to any such document as is referred to in clause (a) above; or (c) by notice in writing, require any insurer to supply him with copies of any of the documents referred to in clause (a), certified by a principal officer of the insurer.]
footnote: 1. Ins. by Act 62 of 1968, s. 33 (w.e.f. 1-6-1969). 2. Subs. by Act 41 of 1999, s. 30 and the First Schedule, for "Controller" (w.e.f. 19-4-2000).
